description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with no explicit Docker image that runs a before_script updating apt, installing npm, nodejs-legacy, and git, then globally installing bower and grunt-cli via npm, followed by npm install and bower install --allow-root. Add a single job called build-project (default test stage) that runs the command grunt and publishes the files in dist/* as artifacts. No caches, services, variables, or deployment rules are defined.
